title: Tom’s Dream
description: The flashback closes around Franky’s survival, his transformation, and the burden of Tom’s dream and the Pluton blueprints.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Tom, Spandam, Kokoro, Yokozuna, World Government agent. The flashback closes around Franky’s survival, his transformation, and the burden of Tom’s dream and the Pluton blueprints.

dialogue.speaker: Yokozuna
dialogue.text: Are the concern for this sinking island...

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: The opening of the sea train...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Excuse us!! We'll take him right away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And it won't go against the waves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There will be no use for logs.

summary: The flashback closes around Franky’s survival, his transformation, and the burden of Tom’s dream and the Pluton blueprints.
